response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical leadership with extensive experience in software development, architecture, and team management across diverse projects and industries. His background includes high-performance systems, open-source contributions, and mentorship, aligning well with the Head of Development/Tech Lead role. While his German proficiency is only basic (required C1), his other qualifications—such as deep technical expertise, strategic thinking, and leadership experience—strongly compensate. The candidate's proactive approach to knowledge sharing and open-source advocacy further underscores his fit.
strengths: Extensive leadership experience in senior software development roles with progressive responsibility
Proven expertise in IT architecture, open-source technologies (Dlang, Linux), and system design
Strong mentorship and team management skills, demonstrated through training, workshops, and project leadership
concerns: German language proficiency is below the required C1 level (only basic listed)
Lacks explicit experience in requirements management and UML modeling, key desired skills
Limited direct experience in IT security, risk management, and compliance, though not explicitly required
